name: Oracle
title: KubeDB Operator for Oracle Database Workloads on Kubernetes
summary: Lifecycle Management for Oracle Database in Kubernetes on Public & Private Cloud
description: This operator provides automation for provisioning, scaling, backup, and recovery of Oracle Database within Kubernetes environments. It is designed for users who already hold valid Oracle licenses and wish to deploy Oracle Database on Kubernetes while remaining responsible for compliance with Oracle's licensing terms. KubeDB offers Kubernetes-native database management for various database systems.

features.title: Provisioning Oracle Database
features.description: Provision Oracle Database workloads on Kubernetes using standard Kubernetes CLI and API. Users must supply their own validly licensed Oracle container images (e.g., from Oracle Container Registry with proper credentials) and are solely responsible for ensuring full compliance with Oracle's licensing terms, including container/Kubernetes-specific rules.

features.title: Version Upgrade
features.description: Orchestrate version upgrades for Oracle Database containers following user-defined maintenance windows. Note: Upgrades must comply with Oracle's support policies for containerized deployments.

features.title: Scaling
features.description: Scale Oracle Database deployments vertically or horizontally within Kubernetes cluster constraints. Scaling depends on Oracle-specific configurations (e.g., Oracle RAC) and licensing.

features.title: Volume Expansion
features.description: Expand persistent volume claims for Oracle Database storage using Kubernetes-native volume expansion features.

features.title: Backup & Restore
features.description: Configure backup and restore operations using Stash. Users are responsible for validating backup integrity and recovery procedures with their Oracle Database version.

features.title: Monitoring
features.description: Monitor Oracle Database workloads using Prometheus-compatible metrics and visualize them with Grafana dashboards.

features.title: TLS Security
features.description: Enable TLS encryption for Oracle Database network traffic and configure encrypted storage volumes.

legalNotice:
Oracle® and Oracle Database® are registered trademarks of Oracle Corporation. KubeDB is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Oracle Corporation. 

KubeDB provides only orchestration and management tooling for Kubernetes. It does not distribute, bundle, ship, or include any Oracle Database software or binaries. 

Users must provide their own Oracle container images and hold valid Oracle licenses. Users are solely responsible for compliance with Oracle's licensing terms, including all rules regarding containers, Docker, and Kubernetes environments. 

KubeDB makes no representations or warranties regarding Oracle licensing compliance.
